title: T-040 — SCN-050 Pick for WO 5-step UI (06-d)
prompt:
# T-040 — SCN-050 Pick for WO

PRD: 06-SCANNER-P1-PRD.md §8.4 FR-SC-FE-040/041/042
UX: design/06-SCANNER-P1-UX.md:507-544 §3.12
Prototype: design/Monopilot Design System/scanner/flow-pick.jsx:5-40 (pick_wo_list_screen), :42-94 (pick_list_screen), :96-238 (pick_scan_screen)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Deliver SCN-050 5-step Pick — wo-list → list (BOM lines sorted by location, FIFO/FEFO highlighted) → scan (location → ✓ → LP → validate → qty) → override (FEFO deviation amber + reason_code) → done.

## Implementation contract
1. Routes /scanner/pick, /scanner/pick/[woId], /scanner/pick/[woId]/scan, /scanner/pick/done.
2. List sorted by location_path; suggested LP highlighted with green 2px border.
3. Override flow per §8.4 FR-SC-FE-041 reasons: expiry_close, location_closer, different_batch, damaged_suggested, other.
4. Wires to T-037.

## Files
- apps/scanner/src/app/scanner/pick/page.tsx [create]
- apps/scanner/src/app/scanner/pick/[woId]/page.tsx [create]
- apps/scanner/src/app/scanner/pick/[woId]/scan/page.tsx [create]
- apps/scanner/src/app/scanner/pick/done/page.tsx [create]
- apps/scanner/__tests__/scn-050-pick.test.tsx [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the 5 steps render, when compared to `design/Monopilot Design System/scanner/flow-pick.jsx:5-40,42-94,96-238`, then they show the same WO list with progress N/M, the same BOM list sorted by location with FEFO blue border, the same scan order location→LP→qty, and the same override amber banner with the 5 reason_codes — RTL snapshot + manual checklist
2. Given a non-suggested LP scanned (FEFO deviation), when ScanInput emits, then the override amber banner is shown and submit is disabled until a reason_code is selected
3. Given a successful pick, when /pick returns 200, then the done step shows progress N+1/M and a 'Następna: <material> w lokalizacji <loc>' chip

## Test strategy
- RED: write scn-050-pick.test.tsx asserting parity + FEFO override gating + done progress before implementation
- Run 'pnpm --filter scanner test scn-050-pick'

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow pick submission with FEFO deviation but no reason_code
- Do not skip the location→LP→qty scan order
- Do not display picked items outside the BOM list

pipeline_inputs.description: SCN-050 5-step pick UI with FEFO override + reason_code modal + progress next-suggestion chip.
pipeline_inputs.details:
Parity checklist:
1) WO list with progress N/M.
2) BOM list sorted by location, FEFO blue 2px border on suggested.
3) Scan order location → LP → qty.
4) Override amber banner with 5 reasons.
5) Done step shows progress + 'Następna' chip with location.
